channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: After Trump's win, Black women are rethinking their role as America's reliable political organizers
item.description: Donald Trump's victory has dismayed many politically engaged Black women, and they're reassessing their enthusiasm for politics and organizing.
item.dc:creator: Kenya Hunter, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: White House mostly mum after Trump victory
item.description: The White House has taken its show largely behind closed doors after Vice President Harris’s stinging defeat to Donald Trump. Harris has all but disappeared from the public eye, jetting off to Hawaii after a few scarce appearances around Washington following her massive loss on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump encounters Senate GOP limits with failed Gaetz AG push
item.description: President-elect Trump's ill-fated nomination of former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) to run the Justice Department marked an early sign of his potential limits in moving his nominees and dealing with Senate Republicans, giving him less wiggle room to get his Cabinet in place.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats rattled by postelection changes
item.description: The Democratic Party is grappling with the aftermath of its blowout loss in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: New York judge calls off Trump hush money sentencing
item.description: President-elect Trump’s sentencing in his New York criminal case will not go forward as planned next week as his attorneys push to dismiss the prosecution following his election victory. Judge Juan Merchan, who oversees the trial proceedings, announced the adjournment in a letter Friday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Florida officials allege 'pervasive' discrimination against Trump supporters at FEMA
item.description: Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and U.S. Rep. Vern Buchanan will hold a news conference Friday "to discuss their efforts to uncover evidence of political discrimination at FEMA and demand accountability," according to a release from Buchanan's office.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump chooses Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Thursday named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump picks Pam Bondi for next attorney general
item.description: President-elect Trump has named former Florida Attorney General Pam Bondi as his next nominee to lead the Department of Justice (DOJ). Bondi was a swift pick just hours after former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) withdrew himself from consideration for the role.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: South Dakota Republican introduces bill to eliminate Department of Education
item.description: The proposal would get rid of the federal agency and move all critical programs to other departments.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation
